description_long: This is a small wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles, giving it a rustic and cozy appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored horizontal wooden planks, and the structure is elevated slightly above the ground on concrete footings. The front facade features a double-door entrance, one side of which is open, and a small window with a grid pattern next to the door. A wooden porch extends from the front, providing a small entry platform. The cabin's simple, functional design is typical of garden sheds or small residential outbuildings, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, double front doors, a window, and a front porch platform.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the brown shingle gable roof and the open double doors on the side.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the double doors, front porch, and a window to the right of the entrance.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the cabin, the open doors, and the edge of the porch.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain wooden back wall and the gable roof without any openings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in reddish-brown asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: one small rectangular window with a grid pattern, positioned to the right of the front doors, asymmetrically placed
attribute_door_placement: double doors located on the front facade, slightly offset to the left, opening onto the porch
